clean_text:
GOVERNMENT OF KARNATAKA
BRUHAT BENGALURU MAHANAGARA PALIKE (BBMP)
COMMISSIONER'S OFFICE, N.R. SQUARE, BENGALURU - 560002
NOTICE INVITING e-TENDER (NIT)
Source: Karnataka Public Procurement Portal (KPPP)   eproc.karnataka.gov.in
NIT Reference: KPPP-BBMP-2026-04-001
SECTION 1   NOTICE INVITING TENDER
1.1  Name of Work:
     Resurfacing of Arterial Roads   BBMP East Zone (Package 3)
     Bituminous Concrete Overlay on 12.8 km of Arterial Roads in
     Mahadevapura and K.R. Puram Divisions, Bengaluru Urban District.
1.2  Estimated Cost of Work:
     Rs. 1,85,00,000/- (Rupees One Crore Eighty-Five Lakh Only)
1.3  Earnest Money Deposit (EMD):
     Rs. 3,70,000/- (Rupees Three Lakh Seventy Thousand Only)
     Payable by RTGS/NEFT or DD in favour of "Commissioner, BBMP, Bengaluru".
1.4  Tender Processing Fee: Rs. 10,000/- (Non-refundable)
1.5  Performance Security: 3% of contract value
1.6  Time for Completion: 6 months from date of commencement
1.7  Number of Covers: 2 (Technical Bid and Financial Bid)
     Schedule of Dates:
     Publication of NIT:              As published on KPPP portal
     Last date for Bid Submission:    14 days from publication
     Opening of Technical Bid:        16 days from publication
     Bid Validity:                    180 days from submission date
SECTION 2   SCOPE OF WORK
2.1  The work involves bituminous concrete (BC) overlay of 12.8 km of arterial
     roads in Mahadevapura and K.R. Puram divisions, including:
     (a) Milling of existing bituminous surface
     (b) Provision of tack coat
     (c) Laying of Dense Bituminous Macadam (DBM) where required
     (d) Bituminous Concrete (BC) wearing course
     (e) Road markings and reflective studs
     (f) Minor storm water drainage repairs as directed by Engineer-in-Charge
2.2  All work shall conform to MORTH Specifications for Road and Bridge Works,
     Fifth Revision (latest), and BBMP Standard Specifications.

SECTION 3   ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA (MANDATORY)
3.1  TECHNICAL QUALIFICATION:
     3.1.1  Registration:
     Bidder must be a Class I Contractor registered with Karnataka Public
     Works Department (Karnataka PWD) or equivalent registration with
     CPWD/State PWD/MES/NHAI. Registration certificate must be valid
     as on date of bid submission.
     3.1.2  Similar Works Experience:
     The bidder must have successfully completed at least 1 (one) similar
     work during the last 5 (five) years ending on the last date of
     submission of bids.
     "Similar work" means road construction, resurfacing, strengthening, or
     widening of roads/highways of bituminous nature.
     The similar work must have a value of not less than Rs. 7,40,000/-
     (Seventy-Four Lakh Only), i.e., 40% of estimated cost.
     Note: Rs. 7,40,000/- = Rs. 74 Lakh = 40% of Rs. 1.85 Crore
     Documents required:
     - Work Order from the client organisation
     - Completion Certificate from officer not below rank of Executive Engineer
     - Performance Certificate indicating satisfactory completion
3.2  FINANCIAL QUALIFICATION:
     3.2.1  Annual Turnover:
     Bidder shall have minimum average annual turnover of Rs. 1,00,00,000/-
     (Rupees One Crore Only) during the last 3 financial years, certified
     by a Chartered Accountant.
     Documents required:
     - CA Certificate for Annual Turnover for FY 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25
     - Audited Balance Sheets for the above years
3.3  COMPLIANCE CRITERIA:
     3.3.1  GST Registration: Valid GSTIN mandatory.
     3.3.2  PAN Card: PAN issued by Income Tax Department mandatory.
     3.3.3  Contractor Labour Licence: Under the Contract Labour
     (R&A) Act, 1970, where applicable.
     3.3.4  ISO 9001:2015 or equivalent QMS certification is preferred
     but not mandatory for this tender.
SECTION 4   GENERAL INSTRUCTIONS TO BIDDERS

4.1  Only Class I Contractors registered with Karnataka PWD or equivalent
     are eligible to participate.
4.2  Bids must be submitted online through the KPPP e-procurement portal
     https://eproc.karnataka.gov.in/eproc-g1/ before the due date and time.
4.3  Physical bid submissions will not be accepted.
4.4  BBMP reserves the right to reject any or all bids without assigning
     any reason.
4.5  Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification.
4.6  The successful bidder must submit Performance Security within 15 days
     of receipt of Letter of Acceptance.
4.7  All materials shall conform to relevant BIS/IRC specifications.
SECTION 5   ANNEXURE   BID SECURITY DECLARATION
The bidder confirms that:
(a) Average Annual Turnover   Rs. 1 Crore for last 3 financial years.
(b) 1 similar road work completed in last 5 years, value   Rs. 74 Lakh.
(c) Class I PWD Karnataka registration or equivalent is valid.
(d) Valid GST registration is held.
(e) PAN card is held.
NOTE: This tender document is derived from Karnataka e-procurement portal
seed data (KPPP-BBMP-2026-04-001, source: github.com/jayanthmb14/forthepeople).
Bidders should verify all details on the official KPPP portal before bidding.
END OF TENDER DOCUMENT
